_comment: @stage-labs/config — shared TypeScript options for the Vue app (apps/ui), layered ON TOP of @vue/tsconfig/tsconfig.dom.json. The consumer extends BOTH (array extends, this one last so it wins): ["@vue/tsconfig/tsconfig.dom.json", "@stage-labs/config/tsconfig/vue.json"]. Package-specific `types`/`baseUrl`/`paths`/`include` stay in the consumer. The full strict family + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + noImplicitOverride match the base so strictness is uniform with the pure-TS packages.
